summary: OfficeCLI is an innovative command-line tool that enables AI agents to create, read, and modify Office documents (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) seamlessly without requiring any Office installation. It simplifies document manipulation into single-line commands, making it accessible for both AI agents and developers.
use_cases: Generate a PowerPoint presentation from scratch using AI commands
Create and edit an Excel budget tracker with real-time updates
Automate the generation of Word project proposals based on AI input
